rationale: All required elements are present and correct: exact title '2025 Revenue ($M)', four #5B8CFF bars with rounded tops on a thin baseline, gray Q1-Q4 labels, and one-decimal value labels that visibly count up (e.g. 7.2/7.1/7.3/6.0 mid-build, settling at 8.2/9.1/11.4/14.0) while riding the bar tops. The filmstrip shows the briefed choreography: empty frame, title plus Q1 starting (stagger visible), staggered growth, a hold through ~5.2s, and a fade-out confirmed by the dimmed 100% still. Bar heights are proportional and labels centered, though the chart block sits left of center leaving a noticeably heavier right margin. Typography is bold, legible, and consistent; only the slight compositional imbalance and the fade not being fully complete at the final frame keep it from a flawless ship.
